title: Terrastorage Dark UI
description: Replaces Terrastorage inventory and chest buttons with darker ones.
body:
Replaces Terrastorage's quick stack, sort, and favorite border sprites with ones in darker colors. Buttons were styled for [Better GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-gui).

Sprites were only recolored and are credited to TimVinci's [Terrastorage](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrastorage); with highlighted colors taken from BizCub's [Better GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-gui).

![Aimed for Better GUI's shade of color.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d234c7bf1ce295e47aae243c616f1ecd40faadb9.png)
